summary:
Claim: Blood on OT floor is cleaned by chlorine-based compounds.  
Evidence: - Chlorine effectively breaks down organic matter in blood through oxidation. - Provides lasting residual antimicrobial action to prevent pathogen survival.  
Answer: C
